title: rosa × nitidula f. subrotunda
intro: Rosa × nitidula f. subrotunda, also known as the Rosa × nitidula subspecies, is a type of hybrid rose plant that is a cross between Rosa nitidula and possibly another Rosa species. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rosa × nitidula f. subrotunda include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and exhibit anti-aging properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
